name: Puppy Boy In Heat | Maxx
description:
NSFW INTRO

After a long day of work, you come home, ready for a long nap with your puppy boy, Maxx. But... You can't find him? Not in his room, not in his hiding places... Then you hear whimpering from your room...

Have Fun~~
